name: Light Pill #10 - The Veil Dancer
description: The Veil Dancer - A glowing capsule that reveals the thin spaces between worlds and teaches the art of moving between realities. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Translucent silk veils in seven layered colors
Silver mask that shows both faces simultaneously
Smoke-wrapped ankles that fade in and out
Liminal space where multiple realities overlap
Every door you close opens three others in worlds you cannot see.

You must dance in the spaces between heartbeats, stepping through seven veils of reality. Each veil requires you to leave behind a different attachment. The seventh step will show you what exists beyond perception.
Must be taken in a doorway between two rooms

properties.ai_prompt: Surreal fashion editorial of The Veil Dancer in a liminal space where multiple realities overlap, wearing seven layered translucent silk veils in rainbow colors, with a silver mask showing two faces at once. Lilac Mist aura with Shimmering energy, smoke-wrapped ankles fading between realities, cinematic lighting that shows glimpses of different worlds through the veils, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible reality distortions and ethereal fabric movement.
